rationale: The cited 2003 JMRK paper is thematically and conceptually close to the citing 2004 paper: both study organizational buying in technology-intensive/complex product systems using conjoint-style field designs. The cited paper’s focus on outsourcing and single-versus-multiple sourcing maps plausibly to the citing paper’s triadic channel constructs (e.g., number and strength of vendor–supplier ties), suggesting a potential theory/mechanism source rather than a generic mention.
